params.name: Dinner Credit Card
params.description: Dinner Credit Card was the first plastic charge card, which eventually became an international credit card. As the oldest credit card in the world, it features a classic cover which makes it a possible collectible. In many regions, joining the Dinner Club was a status symbol.
